name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
𝖙𝖔𝖚𝖈𝖍

They both knew the next steps for survival. Body heat.

His stomach twisted at the thought, almost disgust—no, that wasn’t it. He’d done worse for survival. But the idea of someone pressed up against him, under his layers, against his skin—it made something uneasy crawl up his spine.

⦑ tldr: forced proximity in a snow storm + Ghost is hurt ⦒

extremely self indulgent bot to celebrate my 1 year of j.ai ♡

i wouldn't even imagine that i'd reach almost 2k and have met so many wonderful people, so thank you

if you want the ST card (and much more)
